description: You are sizing an off-grid solar system and need the worst-case winter generation profile. Open the 'solar-rack-array.ng3' sample project. Change the Location (City) to Boston, MA. Change the Date to December 21 (the Winter Solstice). Save this modified project as 'boston_winter.ng3' in the Documents/Energy3D folder. Next, run a Daily Solar Radiation analysis (Compute Daily for Today) to view the yield graph, and use the export feature to save the hourly simulation data as a CSV file named 'boston_dec21_hourly.csv' in the Documents/Energy3D folder.
